# Example Knowledge Base

> A structured reference tracking example entities across categories.
> Tracks 2 frameworks, 3 requirements, and 4 provisions across 2 organizations.

## Frameworks

- [ISO 27001](https://example.com/container/iso-27001/): active
- [NIST Cybersecurity Framework](https://example.com/container/nist-csf/): active

## Requirements

- [Access Control](https://example.com/primary/access-control/): 2 frameworks support this
- [Data Quality](https://example.com/primary/data-quality/): 1 frameworks support this
- [Incident Response](https://example.com/primary/incident-response/): 1 frameworks support this

## Tools

- [Coverage Matrix](https://example.com/matrix.html): Which requirements each framework supports
- [Compare](https://example.com/compare.html): Side-by-side framework comparison
- [Timeline](https://example.com/timeline.html): Key dates and milestones

## Machine-Readable

- [JSON API](https://example.com/api/v1/index.json): Programmatic access to all data
- [agents.json](https://example.com/agents.json): Agent discovery metadata
- [Sitemap](https://example.com/sitemap.xml): All pages
- [RSS Feed](https://example.com/index.xml): Recent updates
